prompt: Japanese Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting gradient descent as a lone traveler descending a stylized mountain with contour lines showing elevation. The mountain surface is carved into smooth terraced bands representing a loss landscape with a single valley at the bottom. Flat unmodulated areas of indigo, ochre, and vermillion. Bold black outlines. No photographic shading. Visible woodgrain texture. Katsushika Hokusai compositional style. Diagonal mountain composition. No text, no numbers. Traditional washi paper texture background.
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated color areas, bold black outlines, no photographic shading, diagonal compositional structure, visible woodgrain texture, muted indigo-ochre-vermillion palette following Hokusai conventions.
